description: MariaDB Galera Cluster Overview - Using mariadb-operator metrics

panels.description: Total uptime of each MariaDB instance in seconds.
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: Rate of total commands executed per second.
panels.title: Current Commands/s (QPS)

panels.description: InnoDB Buffer Pool size limit in bytes.
panels.title: InnoDB Buffer Pool Size

panels.description: Total connection count over time.
panels.title: MySQL Connection Count

panels.description: Thread states: connected, running, cached, created.
panels.title: MySQL Threads

panels.description: Rate of connection errors by error type.
panels.title: MySQL Connection Errors

panels.description: Rate of MySQL commands by command type (select, insert, update, delete, etc).
panels.title: Top Command Counters (rate)

panels.description: Rate of handler operations (read_first, read_key, read_next, write, etc).
panels.title: MySQL Handlers (rate)

panels.description: Rate of sort operations (merge_passes, range, rows, scan).
panels.title: MySQL Sorts (rate)

panels.description: Buffer pool usage in bytes (data vs free).
panels.title: Buffer Pool Usage (bytes)

panels.description: Buffer pool pages by state (data, free, misc, old).
panels.title: Buffer Pool Pages

panels.description: Buffer pool data pages by state (dirty, clean).
panels.title: Buffer Pool Data Pages (dirty/clean)

panels.description: Rate of buffer pool operations (read_requests, reads, write_requests, wait_free).
panels.title: Buffer Pool Operations (rate)

panels.description: Rate of InnoDB page operations (read, written, created).
panels.title: InnoDB Page Operations (rate)

panels.description: Rate of row lock waits and time.
panels.title: MySQL Row & Table Locks (rate)

panels.description: Rate of InnoDB log operations (waits, write_requests, writes).
panels.title: InnoDB Log Operations (rate)

panels.description: Rate of InnoDB double write operations and page flush.
panels.title: InnoDB Double Writes & Page Flushes (rate)

panels.description: Rate of temporary resource creation (tmp_tables, tmp_disk_tables, tmp_files).
panels.title: MySQL Temporary Resources (rate)

panels.description: Rate of prepared statement operations.
panels.title: MySQL Prepared Statements (rate)

panels.description: Rate of opened resources (tables, files, table_definitions).
panels.title: MySQL Opened Resources (rate)

panels.description: Rate of misc InnoDB operations (data_reads, data_writes, data_fsyncs).
panels.title: MySQL InnoDB Operations (rate)

title: MariaDB / Galera - Cluster Overview
